overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character walking through a rainy, nighttime urban environment. The scene features wet reflective streets, modern glass buildings, construction scaffolding, and a snow-covered parked car, with atmospheric fog and artificial street lighting creating a noir aesthetic.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with parked vehicle and construction barriers

agents.ego_description: Batman walking away from a building entrance along a wet sidewalk, passing a snow-covered parked car on the right

entered.detail: Modern glass facade building with reflective windows and metal framing
White sedan covered in snow and frost parked at the curb
Orange and white striped traffic barrels near the parked car
Tall street light illuminating the wet pavement with orange glow

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with Batman walking along a wet city sidewalk at night, departing from a modern glass building entrance. A snow-covered sedan is parked on the right, and construction barrels line the curb ahead as rain creates reflective pools on the concrete surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with construction scaffolding and green tarp barriers

events.description: moving from open building entrance into section with overhead construction scaffolding and green tarps

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk beneath construction scaffolding, passing a blue mailbox on the right

entered.detail: Metal scaffolding structure with wooden planks along the building facade
Green construction tarp covering part of the scaffolding structure
Blue USPS mailbox or newspaper vending stand on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Batman walks beneath construction scaffolding that narrows the sidewalk, with green tarps hanging on the left side. The snow-covered car and glass building fall behind as a blue mailbox appears on the right, and the street lamp shifts to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching urban intersection with street signage

events.description: exiting the construction zone into a more open street section approaching an intersection
slight camera adjustment as character approaches street sign at intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching a street intersection with visible traffic signage and fire hydrants on the right

entered.detail: Black fire hydrant on the sidewalk near the curb
Metal pole with street signs and traffic lights at the intersection
Black metal fence running along the right side of the sidewalk
Building with illuminated windows and glowing signage on the facade

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the construction zone, the view opens toward a street intersection. A fire hydrant appears on the right and grows larger as Batman approaches, while a street sign pole becomes prominent in the center. The scaffolding and mailbox recede behind as commercial buildings with lit windows line the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy urban corridor that transitions from a confined construction zone into an open city intersection. It begins with Batman walking away from a modern glass building past a snow-covered sedan and reflective pools of rainwater on the sidewalk. As he advances, the environment narrows beneath construction scaffolding draped with green tarps, causing the glass building to recede while a blue mailbox and shifting street lamps pass by. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the scaffolding, moving past a fire hydrant and a central street sign pole. Finally, the view expands toward a wide intersection lined with commercial buildings and glowing windows under the nighttime rain.
